global.description: The ad features a vibrant and engaging design promoting a gaming offer.
global.main_message: Encouraging new players to level up and claim rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center element
elements.description: A central graphic element that appears abstract and colorful, possibly representing a game interface.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold, white text that reads 'Level up today', prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: A small logo featuring the text 'PixelForge UGC' in a stylized font, located at the top left.

elements.label: Center graphic
elements.description: A graphic element in the center that appears to be a part of a game interface, with circular shapes.

elements.label: Additional graphic
elements.description: Another circular graphic element located slightly lower in the center, complementing the main graphic.

elements.label: Lower center graphic
elements.description: A smaller circular graphic element positioned below the main graphic, adding to the visual complexity.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: A small text element at the top right that likely provides additional context or information.

elements.label: Top left graphic
elements.description: A small circular graphic element located at the top left, possibly decorative.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element in the center that adds visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: A small text element at the top center that likely provides more information.

elements.label: Lower text
elements.description: A small text element in the center that complements the main message.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom that reads 'Get offer', designed to attract user interaction.
elements.text_content: Level up today Free rewards for new players

elements.label: PixelForge branding
elements.description: A branding element at the top left featuring the text 'PixelForge UGC' in a modern font.

elements.label: Offer button
elements.description: A button at the bottom right that encourages users to take action with the text 'Get offer'.
